r2_norm_sq(r2_sub(b, a)) + r2_norm_sq(r2_sub(c, b)) = r2_norm_sq(r2_add(r2_sub(b, a), r2_sub(c, b)))
not r2_orthogonal(r2_sub(a, b), r2_sub(c, b))
not r2_orthogonal(r2_neg(r2_sub(b, a)), r2_sub(c, b))
function(x0: Pair[Real, Real], x1: Pair[Real, Real]) { not r2_orthogonal(r2_neg(x0), x1) or r2_orthogonal(x0, x1) }(r2_sub(b, a), r2_sub(c, b))
function(x0: Pair[Real, Real], x1: Pair[Real, Real]) { r2_neg(r2_sub(x0, x1)) = r2_sub(x1, x0) }(b, a)
not r2_orthogonal(r2_sub(b, a), r2_sub(c, b)) or not r2_orthogonal(r2_sub(a, b), r2_sub(c, b))
not r2_orthogonal(r2_sub(b, a), r2_sub(c, b))
not r2_orthogonal(r2_neg(r2_sub(b, a)), r2_sub(c, b))
r2_orthogonal(r2_neg(r2_sub(b, a)), r2_sub(c, b))
